attributes.title: Cost by Provider
attributes.visState: {"title": "Cost by Provider", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Cost by Provider\", \"subtitle\": \"Claude charges per token ($3/M in, $15/M out). Copilot charges per request ($0.04 flat). Local is free.\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'grok' ? 'Grok' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"provider\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_cost_usd\", \"as\": \"cost\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.issue\", \"as\": \"issue\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"issue\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13}}, \"x\": {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Cost (USD)\", \"axis\": {\"format\": \"$.2f\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}, \"yOffset\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"sort\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"]}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Time per Issue
attributes.visState: {"title": "Time per Issue", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Time per Issue\", \"subtitle\": \"Wall-clock time each provider took per issue\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'grok' ? 'Grok' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"provider\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_latency_ms / 1000\", \"as\": \"seconds\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.issue\", \"as\": \"issue\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"issue\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13}}, \"x\": {\"field\": \"seconds\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Time (seconds)\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}, \"yOffset\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"sort\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"]}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Tokens by Issue
attributes.visState: {"title": "Tokens by Issue", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Tokens by Issue\", \"subtitle\": \"Raw token volume \\u2014 copilot sends huge contexts cheaply. More tokens \\u2260 more cost.\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'grok' ? 'Grok' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"provider\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_tokens_in + datum._source.total_tokens_out\", \"as\": \"tokens\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.issue\", \"as\": \"issue\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"issue\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13}}, \"x\": {\"field\": \"tokens\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Total Tokens\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}, \"yOffset\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"sort\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"]}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: All Runs: Cost vs Confidence
attributes.visState: {"title": "All Runs: Cost vs Confidence", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"All Runs: Cost vs Confidence\", \"subtitle\": \"Sweet spot is top-left \\u2014 high confidence, low cost\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'grok' ? 'Grok' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"provider\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.confidence\", \"as\": \"confidence\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_cost_usd\", \"as\": \"cost\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_tokens_in + datum._source.total_tokens_out\", \"as\": \"tokens\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.review_pass === true ? 'pass' : 'fail'\", \"as\": \"review\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.issue\", \"as\": \"issue\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.workflow_name\", \"as\": \"workflow\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.criteria_passed + '/' + datum._source.criteria_total\", \"as\": \"criteria_ratio\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"point\", \"filled\": true, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Cost (USD)\", \"axis\": {\"format\": \"$.2f\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"confidence\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Confidence\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [0, 1]}, \"axis\": {\"format\": \".0%\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}, \"size\": {\"field\": \"tokens\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Total Tokens\", \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 12}}, \"shape\": {\"field\": \"review\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Review\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"pass\", \"fail\"], \"range\": [\"circle\", \"triangle-up\"]}}, \"tooltip\": [{\"field\": \"issue\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Issue\"}, {\"field\": \"workflow\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Workflow\"}, {\"field\": \"provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\"}, {\"field\": \"confidence\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Confidence\", \"format\": \".0%\"}, {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Cost\", \"format\": \"$.4f\"}, {\"field\": \"criteria_ratio\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Criteria\"}]}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Model Usage
attributes.visState: {"title": "Model Usage", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Model Usage\", \"subtitle\": \"Which models are being called and how often?\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-llm-calls\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"calculate\": \"datum._source.model\", \"as\": \"model\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.provider\", \"as\": \"llm_provider\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"model\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"-x\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13}}, \"x\": {\"aggregate\": \"count\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Calls\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"llm_provider\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Provider\", \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Cost by Step
attributes.visState: {"title": "Cost by Step", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Cost by Step\", \"subtitle\": \"Where is money being spent in the pipeline? (zero-cost steps hidden)\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-llm-calls\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"calculate\": \"datum._source.cost_usd\", \"as\": \"cost\"}, {\"filter\": \"datum.cost > 0\"}, {\"calculate\": \"split(datum._source.step, '/')[length(split(datum._source.step, '/')) - 1]\", \"as\": \"step\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Your Computer' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot (Cloud)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma (Free)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'grok' ? 'Grok' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"who\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"step\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"-x\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"labelLimit\": 200}}, \"x\": {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"aggregate\": \"sum\", \"title\": \"Total Cost (USD)\", \"axis\": {\"format\": \"$.2f\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"who\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Who did it?\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Your Computer\", \"Claude (Cloud)\", \"Copilot (Cloud)\", \"Gemma (Free)\", \"Grok\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": {\"labelFontSize\": 13, \"titleFontSize\": 14}}}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: What You're Paying
attributes.visState: {"title": "What You're Paying", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"What You're Paying\", \"subtitle\": \"Total cost per provider across all runs. Local/Gemma/Llama = $0.\", \"fontSize\": 16, \"subtitleFontSize\": 12, \"subtitleColor\": \"#888\"}, \"autosize\": \"fit\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"%context%\": true, \"index\": \"glitch-workflow-runs\", \"body\": {\"size\": 500}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"filter\": \"datum._source.issue != '' && datum._source.issue != null\"}, {\"filter\": \"datum._source.comparison_group != ''\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.comparison_group == 'local' ? 'Local ($0)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'claude' ? 'Claude' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'copilot' ? 'Copilot' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'gemma' ? 'Gemma ($0)' : datum._source.comparison_group == 'grok' ? 'Grok' : datum._source.comparison_group\", \"as\": \"who\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum._source.total_cost_usd\", \"as\": \"cost\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"bar\", \"cornerRadiusEnd\": 6, \"tooltip\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"who\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": null, \"sort\": \"-x\", \"axis\": {\"labelFontSize\": 14}}, \"x\": {\"field\": \"cost\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"aggregate\": \"sum\", \"title\": \"Total Cost (USD)\", \"stack\": null, \"axis\": {\"format\": \"$.2f\", \"labelFontSize\": 12, \"titleFontSize\": 13}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"who\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Local ($0)\", \"Claude\", \"Copilot\", \"Gemma ($0)\", \"Grok\"], \"range\": [\"#54B399\", \"#6092C0\", \"#D36086\", \"#DA8B45\", \"#B9A888\"]}, \"legend\": null}, \"tooltip\": [{\"field\": \"who\", \"title\": \"Provider\"}, {\"field\": \"cost\", \"title\": \"Total Cost\", \"aggregate\": \"sum\", \"format\": \"$.4f\"}, {\"field\": \"cost\", \"title\": \"Runs\", \"aggregate\": \"count\"}]}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}}"}, "aggs": []}

attributes.title: Tier Distribution Over Time
attributes.visState: {"title":"Tier Distribution Over Time","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\",\"title\":{\"text\":\"Where Are Your LLM Calls Landing?\",\"subtitle\":\"Green = local (free). Yellow = cheap cloud. Red = premium. Less red = more savings.\",\"fontSize\":16,\"subtitleFontSize\":12,\"subtitleColor\":\"#888\"},\"autosize\":\"fit\",\"data\":{\"url\":{\"%context%\":true,\"index\":\"glitch-llm-calls\",\"body\":{\"size\":500}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"hits.hits\"}},\"transform\":[{\"calculate\":\"datum._source.final_tier == 0 ? 'Local (Free)' : datum._source.final_tier == 1 ? 'Cloud (Cheap)' : 'Premium'\",\"as\":\"tier_label\"},{\"calculate\":\"toDate(datum._source.timestamp)\",\"as\":\"time\"}],\"mark\":{\"type\":\"bar\",\"tooltip\":true},\"encoding\":{\"x\":{\"field\":\"time\",\"type\":\"temporal\",\"timeUnit\":\"hoursminutes\",\"title\":\"Time\"},\"y\":{\"aggregate\":\"count\",\"title\":\"LLM Calls\"},\"color\":{\"field\":\"tier_label\",\"type\":\"nominal\",\"title\":\"Tier\",\"scale\":{\"domain\":[\"Local (Free)\",\"Cloud (Cheap)\",\"Premium\"],\"range\":[\"#54B399\",\"#DA8B45\",\"#D36086\"]}}},\"config\":{\"view\":{\"stroke\":null}}}"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Smart Routing Cost Savings
attributes.visState: {"title":"Smart Routing Cost Savings","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\",\"title\":{\"text\":\"Money Saved by Smart Routing\",\"subtitle\":\"Blue = what you paid. Red = what premium would have cost. Gap = savings.\",\"fontSize\":16,\"subtitleFontSize\":12,\"subtitleColor\":\"#888\"},\"autosize\":\"fit\",\"data\":{\"url\":{\"%context%\":true,\"index\":\"glitch-llm-calls\",\"body\":{\"size\":500}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"hits.hits\"}},\"transform\":[{\"calculate\":\"datum._source.cost_usd\",\"as\":\"actual_cost\"},{\"calculate\":\"(datum._source.tokens_in * 3.0 / 1000000) + (datum._source.tokens_out * 15.0 / 1000000)\",\"as\":\"premium_cost\"},{\"calculate\":\"toDate(datum._source.timestamp)\",\"as\":\"time\"},{\"fold\":[\"actual_cost\",\"premium_cost\"],\"as\":[\"cost_type\",\"cost\"]},{\"calculate\":\"datum.cost_type == 'actual_cost' ? 'Actual (Smart Routed)' : 'If Everything Was Premium'\",\"as\":\"label\"}],\"mark\":{\"type\":\"line\",\"interpolate\":\"monotone\",\"strokeWidth\":3,\"point\":true},\"encoding\":{\"x\":{\"field\":\"time\",\"type\":\"temporal\",\"title\":\"Time\"},\"y\":{\"field\":\"cost\",\"type\":\"quantitative\",\"title\":\"Cumulative Cost (USD)\",\"axis\":{\"format\":\"$.4f\"}},\"color\":{\"field\":\"label\",\"type\":\"nominal\",\"title\":\"Cost Type\",\"scale\":{\"domain\":[\"Actual (Smart Routed)\",\"If Everything Was Premium\"],\"range\":[\"#6092C0\",\"#D36086\"]}}},\"config\":{\"view\":{\"stroke\":null}}}"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: Escalation Hotspots
attributes.visState: {"title":"Escalation Hotspots","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{\"$schema\":\"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\",\"title\":{\"text\":\"Which Steps Escalate Most?\",\"subtitle\":\"Taller bars = steps that can't be handled locally. Consider fixing the prompt or pinning the tier.\",\"fontSize\":16,\"subtitleFontSize\":12,\"subtitleColor\":\"#888\"},\"autosize\":\"fit\",\"data\":{\"url\":{\"%context%\":true,\"index\":\"glitch-llm-calls\",\"body\":{\"size\":500}},\"format\":{\"property\":\"hits.hits\"}},\"transform\":[{\"filter\":\"datum._source.escalated == true\"},{\"calculate\":\"datum._source.step\",\"as\":\"step\"},{\"calculate\":\"datum._source.escalation_reason\",\"as\":\"reason\"}],\"mark\":{\"type\":\"bar\",\"cornerRadiusEnd\":6,\"tooltip\":true},\"encoding\":{\"y\":{\"field\":\"step\",\"type\":\"nominal\",\"title\":\"Workflow Step\",\"sort\":\"-x\",\"axis\":{\"labelFontSize\":12}},\"x\":{\"aggregate\":\"count\",\"title\":\"Escalation Count\"},\"color\":{\"field\":\"reason\",\"type\":\"nominal\",\"title\":\"Reason\",\"scale\":{\"domain\":[\"structural\",\"eval\",\"provider_error\"],\"range\":[\"#D36086\",\"#DA8B45\",\"#6092C0\"]}}},\"config\":{\"view\":{\"stroke\":null}}}"},"aggs":[]}

attributes.title: glitch LLM Intelligence
attributes.description: General-purpose glitch intelligence dashboard — confidence, cost, throughput, and learning trends across all workflows
